name: l2_powered_hover_surface_wake_transit
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredHoverSurfaceWakeTransit brackets surface wake arrival time for rotor-resolved hover probes.
note: Primary audit surface for transient A4MC powered-hover surface wake probes.

name: l2_powered_hover_surface_probe_map
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredHoverSurfaceProbeMap supplies rotor-resolved ground and ceiling probe locations and pressure targets.
note: Spatial probe contract input.

name: l2_powered_hover_source_map
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredHoverSourceMap supplies hover induced velocity and far-wake velocity context.
note: Wake-speed context input.

name: drone_config_dynamic_inflow
value: DroneConfig RotorSpec induced inflow time constants provide the configured lag comparison.
note: Dynamic inflow lag reference.

name: l2_actuator_disk_calibration
value: Aerodynamics4McL2ActuatorDiskCalibration anchors the momentum-theory induced and far-wake velocities.
note: Momentum-theory wake velocity reference.

name: aerodynamics4mc_l2_target
value: Aerodynamics4MC Core is the upstream CFD target for live transient wake arrival probes.
note: Upstream CFD target for live validation.
